name: Biscotti - the Dipping Cookie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Toast nuts until browned, about 8 minutes; let cool.
3. Use a metal blade in the food processor work bowl to finely chop zest and granulated sugar for about 60 seconds.
4. Add brown sugar, extracts, margarine, and eggs; process until combined for about 5 seconds.
5. Add nuts and dry ingredients and pulse until combined for about 12 times.
6. Transfer dough to a floured surface; roll into two 12-inch logs.
7. Pat logs to 2 1/2 inches wide.
8. Place the logs 3 inches apart on lightly greased baking sheets.
9. Beat egg white slightly and brush over the surface of the logs.
10. Bake for 20 minutes until firm and lightly browned.
11. Remove from oven; reduce heat to 325°F (160°C).
12. While still warm, cut logs diagonally into 1/2-inch slices, lay cut side down on sheets.
13. Bake for an additional 15 minutes until dry.
14. Cool on wire racks.
Store in a plastic food storage bag or tin for up to 1 month.
